chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Transfer Application No.S-129 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 8026/2017 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 8027/17 4. For Katcha Peshi. 17.11.2017. Mr. Abdul Hameed Bajwa, Advocate for the applicant. Applicant by means of this transfer application is seeking transfer of case No.1203/2015 bearing Crime No. 59/2015, under sections 420, 464, 465, 468, 470, 471, 506/2, 402, 34 PPC P.S Hussainabad, Hyderabad, pending before the IInd Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate, Hyderabad on the ground that although the arguments were heard by the said Presiding Officer on 24.04.2017 but still the judgment has not been announced by him. Additionally, learned counsel has pointed out to Page-51 whereby a complaint was made against the Investigating Officer and the staff of Court of Judicial Magistrate-V, Hyderabad and has submitted that the applicant has lost faith on the Presiding Officer. Admittedly, the grounds as above could not be considered as a valid justification for transfer of the case from one Court to the other. As far the grievance of the applicant that still the judgment has not been announced, it would suffice to issue direction to the said Presiding Officer to dispose of the case within a certain period. In the circumstances, this application is dismissed in limine alongwith listed applications. However, the Presiding Officer is directed to announce the judgment of the subject case within a period of one month. JUDGE Ali Haider
